changeSet.author: zafar
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO product_categories (type) SELECT 'Чай' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_categories WHERE type='Чай')
INSERT INTO product_categories (type) SELECT 'Супы' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_categories WHERE type='Супы')
INSERT INTO product_categories (type) SELECT 'Закуски' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_categories WHERE type='Закуски')
INSERT INTO product_categories (type) SELECT 'Пицца' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_categories WHERE type='Пицца')
INSERT INTO product_categories (type) SELECT 'Паста' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_categories WHERE type='Паста')
INSERT INTO product_categories (type) SELECT 'Боулы' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_categories WHERE type='Боулы')

UPDATE products SET type_id = (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE type = 'Чай') WHERE name IN ('Масала Чай', 'Куркума Латте', 'Матча Латте', 'Чай Карк') AND type_id = (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE type = 'Специи')
